name: button

metadata.response:
Item Details:

## button
**Type:** registry:ui
**Files:** 1 file(s)
**Dependencies:** radix-ui

visual_summary: A button is a UI component that is typically a rectangle with custom text and/or icon displayed on it. It is used to trigger an action or navigation. Buttons can be displayed in a variety of colors and sizes, and are commonly used across digital products.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button
Description: A button is a UI component that is typically a rectangle with custom text and/or icon displayed on it. It is used to trigger an action or navigation. Buttons can be displayed in a variety of colors and sizes, and are commonly used across digital products.
Style: flat, elevated, outline
Interactions: clickable, hover, active
Tags: interactive, user-action, clickable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
